con_a_pers_elab: Constituion A revolves more around high levels of intelligence, factual accuracy, and fewer hallucinations. I use AI to aid me in my field of machine learning, so high intelligence and accuracy is paramount
con_a_gov_elab: Constituion A also mentions upholding ethical standards, I think when using AI as a governing source the ethical standards begin to matter much more. B does not mention anything about ethics which is why I choose A

con_b_pers_elab: I think B is more thorough. I would trust it more due to the effort put into providing the answer.
con_b_govern_elab: Due to the fact that I want direct answers on this topic, A would be more desirable.

con_a_pers_elab: I like option B because it is more to the point.  The objectives are short and easy to understand.
con_a_gov_elab: I prefer option A for the population.  I like how it addresses that it will not provide false or harmful information to anyone.

con_a_pers_elab: It reads more professionally. It also is more thorough and expands on each point.
con_a_gov_elab: Each topic is explained in more detail. It also makes each topic easier to understand.

con_a_pers_elab: My use of AI is very basic and I prefer a straight forward response over the extra content or engagement that has no impact on my request.
con_a_gov_elab: I prefer a direct and straight forward response that is as condensed and streamlined as possible.

con_b_pers_elab: Constitution A is more concise, simple, and easier to understand.
